common.voice_required: You need to join a voice channel first.
common.not_same_channel: You must be in the same voice channel as the bot to use this.
common.no_player: Nothing is currently playing in this server.
common.no_track: There is no track playing right now.
common.generic_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
common.queue_empty: No additional songs in the queue.
common.buttons_help: Use the buttons below to control playback
common.no_voice_permissions: I don't have permission to join or speak in that voice channel.
common.no_text_permissions: I don't have permission to send messages or embeds in this channel.
common.panel_paused: Panel paused. Logs unlocked. Press "l" to return to the panel.
common.panel_hint: Press "l" to toggle panel/logs • Ctrl+C to exit

errors.command_failed: Something went wrong while running this command.
errors.lavalink_error_title: Oops, I had a little connection issue.
errors.lavalink_error_description: Our servers are unstable at the moment! Please don't remove the bot from the server, it's temporary and will be fixed soon!
errors.node_down_description:
The server that was playing your music went offline.

But since I'm a nice bot, I saved your queue :3

queue.title: Current queue
queue.empty: No additional songs in the queue.

now_playing.footer_hint: Use the buttons below to control playback

lonely.expired_title: Well, I'm leaving, nobody came back...
lonely.expired: Nobody returned within 2 minutes. The saved queue has been discarded.
lonely.return_description: {user}, I was playing **{track}** at `{position}/{duration}` with **{queue}** track(s) in the queue. Want to continue?
lonely.snapshot_expired: The saved session has already expired.
lonely.restore_failed: Failed to restore the queue. Try using /play again.
lonely.discarded: The previous queue was discarded. Use /play to start a new one!

play.description: Play a song or playlist using Kazagumo
play.already_other_channel: I'm already playing in another voice channel.
play.no_results: I couldn't find any results for that search.
play.no_results_description:
I couldn't find any results for your search.

Try again with different keywords or check if the link is correct.

Note: Live streams are not supported.
play.load_failed_description:
I couldn't load this track.

The link may be invalid or the content is unavailable.
play.search_error: Something went wrong while searching for this track.

resumequeue.description: Resume the last saved queue after a disconnection
resumequeue.no_cache_description:
There's no saved queue to resume.

The queue cache expires after 1 hour or when the queue finishes naturally.
resumequeue.failed_description: I couldn't load any tracks from the saved queue.
resumequeue.success_description: **{count}** track(s) have been added to the queue.

filter.description: Open the audio filter control panel
filter.no_track: There is no track playing right now.

embed.title: 🎛️ Audio Filter Panel
embed.description: Select which filters you want to apply to the music:
embed.available_value:
🎵 **Bass Boost** - Boost low frequencies
⚡ **Nightcore** - Speed and pitch boost
🎤 **Karaoke** - Vocal reduction
🌀 **8D Audio** - Rotational effect
🔄 **Reset** - Remove all filters
embed.howto_value: Click the buttons to toggle filters. Active filters turn blue.
embed.footer: ⚠️ Filters can take a moment to apply

ping.description: Measure latency for Discord, Lavalink, and Cloudflare

skip.description: Skip to the next track in the queue
skip.no_track: There is no current track to skip.

skipto.description: Jump to a specific track in the queue
skipto.option_position: Position in the queue (1 = next track)
skipto.invalid_position: Please provide a position of 1 or greater.
skipto.too_short: The queue doesn't have that many tracks.

stop.description: Stop playback and clear the queue

shuffle.empty: The queue is empty or has only one track.

seek.description: Jump to a specific position in the current track
seek.invalid: Invalid time. Try something like `90s`, `1m20s` or `01:30`.
seek.error: I couldn't change the position of this track.

language.description: Select the bot language for this server
language.not_available: Language settings are not available right now.

errors.not_owner: Only bot owners can use this command.
errors.storage_unavailable: Presence storage is not available right now.
errors.unexpected: Something went wrong while updating the status.

setstatus.description: Change the bot status (Online, DND, Idle, Invisible)

errors.message_required: ❌ Please provide a message for the activity.
errors.streaming_message_required: ❌ Please provide a message for streaming.
errors.streaming_url: ❌ For streaming, provide a valid URL (Twitch/YouTube).

errors.storage_unavailable: Log settings are not available right now.
errors.status_failed: I couldn't read the log settings. Try again later.
errors.toggle_failed: I couldn't update the log settings.

logs.enable_description: I'll send a log every time a user starts a new track.
logs.disable_description: I won't send music start logs anymore.

schedule.success_description: I'll restart automatically as soon as I'm not connected to any voice channel.
schedule.already_description: I'm already waiting to restart when there are no active voice connections.

cancel.none_description: There is no scheduled restart to cancel.

lock.enabled_description: All commands have been locked for non-admin users.
lock.disabled_description: All commands are now available again.

main.title: 📚 Command Center
main.description:
Welcome to the help menu! Select a category below to explore all available commands.

**Quick Info:**
🎵 Play music from YouTube, Spotify, Deezer, and more
⚙️ Customize your experience with settings
🛠️ Useful utilities for server management
main.footer: Made with ❤️ | Select a category to get started

categories.music_description: Play, control, and manage your music

music.description: Complete control over your music playback with {count} commands. Supports YouTube, Spotify, Deezer, Apple Music, SoundCloud, and more!
music.play: Play a song or add to queue (URL or search)
music.skipto: Skip to a specific position in queue
music.seek: Jump to a specific time in the track
music.lyrics: Display synced lyrics for the current song
music.filters: Apply audio filters (bass boost, nightcore, karaoke, rotation)

config.description: Personalize your bot experience with custom settings.
config.language: Change the bot's language ({count} languages supported)

utilities.description: Useful tools to monitor bot performance and connectivity.
utilities.ping: Check Discord, Lavalink, and Cloudflare latency

admin.description: ⚠️ **Bot Owner Only** - Advanced administrative commands for bot management.

help.footer: Use the dropdown menu to switch categories

lyrics.searching_footer: This may take a few seconds.
